programme.title: اليوم الأول - الفروسية - سيف سمو الأمير 2026 – السباق
programme.desc: يعود سباق جائزة الأب أمير 2026 في الفترة من 9 إلى 10 يناير 2026، حيث يجمع بين السباقات الأصيلة من الدرجة الأولى على مدار يومين من العمل التنافسي، ويضم تشكيلة دولية قوية ومسابقات عالية المخاطر وأجواء متميزة تحتفل برياضة النخبة وتقاليدها ومكانتها في تقويم السباقات في قطر.

programme.title: اليوم الثالث - الأعطال * الوقت 1.45م - تشي الشقب مقدم من لونجين 2026
programme.desc: تشي الشقب الذي قدمته لونجين 2026، والذي سيعقد في الفترة من 18 إلى 22 فبراير 2026، يتميز بمنافسة الفروسية على مستوى عالمي في مكان الشقب في الدوحة. يجمع هذا الحدث بين الدراجين الدوليين الرائدين الذين يتنافسون في القفز والترويض على أعلى مستوى، بما في ذلك أبطال الأولمبياد والعالم، مما يسلط الضوء على الدقة والأسلوب والتميز في واحدة من أرقى المراحل الرياضية.

programme.title: اليوم الأول -CSI3 * - جولة لونجين العالمية 2026 – جولة الدوحة
programme.desc: تقام جولة أبطال لونجين العالمية 2026 – جولة الدوحة في الفترة من 4 إلى 7 مارس 2026، وتجمع بين أبرز فرسان القفز في العالم ونخبة الخيول في الشقب. كجزء من واحدة من أرقى السلاسل العالمية لرياضة الفروسية، يتميز الحدث بمنافسة عالية المستوى تعرض الدقة والسرعة والأداء العالمي على مدى أربعة أيام من القفز الدولي.

programme.desc: انضم إلينا في مغامرة ملحمية لرياضة السيارات تأخذ السائقين وسياراتهم القائمة على الإنتاج عبر التضاريس الصعبة في الموسم 54 من بطولة العالم للراليات.

programme.title: الفردي للرجال SF 1 Alcaraz v Zverev

programme.title: السيلية ضد الدحيل - دوري نجوم قطر 2025/26 - الأسبوع 18
programme.desc: الدوري القطري هو الدوري الرسمي لكرة القدم في قطر. ويضم الدوري 12 فريقا. أشهر الأندية المشاركة هي السد، أبطال الموسم الماضي ؛ الريان والعربي، الفرق الشعبية، الدحيل والغرافة، المتنافسين الجادين على اللقب كل موسم. يضم الدوري القطري أسماء نجوم مثل فيرمينو وفيراتي وأكرم عفيف القطري، أفضل لاعب في آسيا.

programme.title: هيوستن ضد سان أنطونيو - موسم الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين 2025–2026
programme.desc: تغطية حية وحصرية على beIN للرابطة الوطنية لكرة السلة، الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين. يتكون الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين من 30 فريقا وهو واحد من الدوريات الرياضية الاحترافية الكبرى في الولايات المتحدة وكندا وهو الدوري المحترف الأول لكرة السلة في العالم.

programme.title: هيوستن ضد سان أنطونيو - موسم الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين 2025–2026
programme.desc: تغطية حية وحصرية على beIN للرابطة الوطنية لكرة السلة، الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين. يتكون الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين من 30 فريقا وهو واحد من الدوريات الرياضية الاحترافية الكبرى في الولايات المتحدة وكندا وهو الدوري المحترف الأول لكرة السلة في العالم.

programme.title: مانسفيلد تاون ضد أرسنال - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: كأس التحدي لاتحاد كرة القدم، والمعروف أكثر باسم كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي، هي أقدم مسابقة وطنية لكرة القدم في العالم يعود تاريخها إلى موسم 1871-1872. يتنافس 736 ناديًا للحصول على فرصة لرفع واحدة من أشهر بطولات كرة القدم الإنجليزية. جميع أفضل المباريات مباشرة وحصرية فقط على beIN.

programme.title: سباق - جائزة أستراليا الكبرى للفورمولا 1 - 2026
programme.desc: ألبرت بارك (ملبورن)، 6–8 مارس 2026: افتتاح الموسم. تعطي الممارسة أول قراءة حقيقية للوتيرة على المدى الطويل وتآكل الإطارات، والتأهل هو معركة ذات لفة واحدة مسطحة حيث يكون تطور المضمار مهمًا، وسباق الجائزة الكبرى هو 58 لفة (306.124 كم) تتشكل من الاستراتيجية وسيارات السلامة ونوافذ الحفر.

programme.title: وست هام يونايتد ضد برينتفورد - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: فاز برينتفورد بسبع من مبارياته العشر ضد وست هام يونايتد في جميع المسابقات منذ أن أصبح فريقًا في الدوري الممتاز في عام 2021 ؛ لم يهزموا فريقًا أكثر خلال تلك الفترة. هذه هي المرة الثالثة التي يتم فيها سحب وست هام وبرينتفورد ضد بعضهما البعض في كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي – تقدم النحل في إعادة الجولة الرابعة في 1926-27 بينما فاز المطارق 1-0 في الجولة الثالثة في 2022-23 من خلال ضربة سعيد بن رحمة.

programme.title: وست هام يونايتد ضد برينتفورد - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: فاز برينتفورد بسبع من مبارياته العشر ضد وست هام يونايتد في جميع المسابقات منذ أن أصبح فريقًا في الدوري الممتاز في عام 2021 ؛ لم يهزموا فريقًا أكثر خلال تلك الفترة. هذه هي المرة الثالثة التي يتم فيها سحب وست هام وبرينتفورد ضد بعضهما البعض في كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي – تقدم النحل في إعادة الجولة الرابعة في 1926-27 بينما فاز المطارق 1-0 في الجولة الثالثة في 2022-23 من خلال ضربة سعيد بن رحمة.

programme.title: دنفر مقابل أوكلاهوما سيتي - موسم الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين 2025–2026
programme.desc: تغطية حية وحصرية على beIN للرابطة الوطنية لكرة السلة، الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين. يتكون الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين من 30 فريقا وهو واحد من الدوريات الرياضية الاحترافية الكبرى في الولايات المتحدة وكندا وهو الدوري المحترف الأول لكرة السلة في العالم.

programme.title: مانسفيلد تاون ضد أرسنال - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: كأس التحدي لاتحاد كرة القدم، والمعروف أكثر باسم كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي، هي أقدم مسابقة وطنية لكرة القدم في العالم يعود تاريخها إلى موسم 1871-1872. يتنافس 736 ناديًا للحصول على فرصة لرفع واحدة من أشهر بطولات كرة القدم الإنجليزية. جميع أفضل المباريات مباشرة وحصرية فقط على beIN.

programme.title: ريكسهام ضد تشيلسي - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: كأس التحدي لاتحاد كرة القدم، والمعروف أكثر باسم كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي، هي أقدم مسابقة وطنية لكرة القدم في العالم يعود تاريخها إلى موسم 1871-1872. يتنافس 736 ناديًا للحصول على فرصة لرفع واحدة من أشهر بطولات كرة القدم الإنجليزية. جميع أفضل المباريات مباشرة وحصرية فقط على beIN.

programme.title: غلطة سراي مقابل ليفربول - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - ربع النهائي - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: Galatasaray have only lost one of their last nine home games against English clubs in all European competition, going down 1-4 to Arsenal in December 2014. They have already beaten Liverpool 1-0 at home in this season's competition. Liverpool have won just one of five previous UEFA Champions League meetings with Galatasaray, a win rate of 20% - their joint-lowest against any side they have faced 5+ times in the competition.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Newcastle United have faced Barcelona five times before in Europe, each coming in the UEFA Champions League. The Magpies’ only victory came in the first clash, 3-2 at home in the Group Stages in September 1997, with Barca winning each of the following four games. Barcelona have faced English opposition 33 times in the knockout stages of the UEFA Champions League, winning 10 of their last 12 matches since 2014.

programme.title: Botafogo (BRA) vs Barcelona (ECU) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Phase 3 - 2nd Leg
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Bayer Leverkusen vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg

Gabriel Diallo (CAN) vs Félix Auger‑Aliassime (CAN) - ATP 1000 BNP Paribas Open
programme.desc: Played at Indian Wells Tennis Garden, this ATP Masters 1000 features one of the slowest hard courts on tour, with a high bounce that neutralizes power and rewards heavy topspin and patience. Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.

programme.title: AFC Wimbledon vs Northampton - EFL - English Football League SkyBet - League One 2025/2026
programme.desc: Live and exclusive action from the EFL (English Football League) One. EFL One is the third-tier in the English football league system. programme.title: Leeds United vs Norwich City - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: Leeds have lost two of their last 15 meetings with Norwich in all competitions, on both occasions losing to current manager Daniel Farke when he was Canaries boss in April 2018 and February 2019. This is the fourth FA Cup tie between Leeds and Norwich – the Canaries went through in a fourth round replay in 1934-35, while the Whites won 5-0 in a third round second replay in 1972-73 and then 5-2 in the third round in 1976-77.

programme.desc: كأس التحدي لاتحاد كرة القدم، والمعروف أكثر باسم كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي، هي أقدم مسابقة وطنية لكرة القدم في العالم يعود تاريخها إلى موسم 1871-1872. يتنافس 736 ناديًا للحصول على فرصة لرفع واحدة من أشهر بطولات كرة القدم الإنجليزية. جميع أفضل المباريات مباشرة وحصرية فقط على beIN.

programme.title: وست هام يونايتد ضد برينتفورد - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: فاز برينتفورد بسبع من مبارياته العشر ضد وست هام يونايتد في جميع المسابقات منذ أن أصبح فريقًا في الدوري الممتاز في عام 2021 ؛ لم يهزموا فريقًا أكثر خلال تلك الفترة. هذه هي المرة الثالثة التي يتم فيها سحب وست هام وبرينتفورد ضد بعضهما البعض في كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي – تقدم النحل في إعادة الجولة الرابعة في 1926-27 بينما فاز المطارق 1-0 في الجولة الثالثة في 2022-23 من خلال ضربة سعيد بن رحمة.

programme.title: غلطة سراي مقابل ليفربول - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - ربع النهائي - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: Galatasaray have only lost one of their last nine home games against English clubs in all European competition, going down 1-4 to Arsenal in December 2014. They have already beaten Liverpool 1-0 at home in this season's competition. Liverpool have won just one of five previous UEFA Champions League meetings with Galatasaray, a win rate of 20% - their joint-lowest against any side they have faced 5+ times in the competition.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Newcastle United have faced Barcelona five times before in Europe, each coming in the UEFA Champions League. The Magpies’ only victory came in the first clash, 3-2 at home in the Group Stages in September 1997, with Barca winning each of the following four games. Barcelona have faced English opposition 33 times in the knockout stages of the UEFA Champions League, winning 10 of their last 12 matches since 2014.

programme.title: Atalanta vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This will be Atalanta’s 14 match against German opposition across major European competition, losing just three of those matches overall and winning four of their last five since the start of 2024. Bayern Munich and Atalanta have never faced before in European competition. The Germans lost their last knockout stage tie against Italian opposition in the UEFA Champions League, after having progressed from each of their previous four knockout ties against Serie A sides in the competition.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Manchester City - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Manchester City will face Real Madrid for the 16th time in the UEFA Champions League, twice as often as they have faced any other team in the competition. This will be the first time two teams have met in the knockout phase of the competition in five consecutive seasons. Only Bayern Munich and Juventus have won more UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid than Manchester City, who beat them 2-1 in this season's league phase.

programme.title: Lille vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This is the fifth European meeting between Lille and Aston Villa – they met twice in the Intertoto Cup in 2002, with Villa drawing away and winning 2-0 at Villa Park, then faced in the 2023-24 Conference League quarter-final. Aston Villa have never won an away European match in France in six attempts, losing the last three in a row.

programme.title: Celta de Vigo vs Olympique Lyonnais - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Celta Vigo won none of their first four major European matches against French sides but they’ve won both this season, beating Nice and Lille – on both occasions 2-1 – in the group stage. This is Lyon’s 34th meeting with Spanish clubs in major European competitions but their first ever with Celta Vigo. They’ve already lost to Spanish opposition in the UEFA Europa League this season, a 2-0 defeat to Real Betis in the group stage.

programme.title: Highlights - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2025–26 UEFA Europa League. The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.desc: This will be Atalanta’s 14 match against German opposition across major European competition, losing just three of those matches overall and winning four of their last five since the start of 2024. Bayern Munich and Atalanta have never faced before in European competition. The Germans lost their last knockout stage tie against Italian opposition in the UEFA Champions League, after having progressed from each of their previous four knockout ties against Serie A sides in the competition.

programme.title: La Liga Highlights 2025/2026
programme.desc: "This 55-minute program offers full 5-minute highlights of each of the games played on Friday, Saturday and Sunday.LALIGA includes special video presentations of the best goal, the best save and the best player of the day."

programme.title: Bodø / Glimt vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This will be the first ever knockout stage tie between teams from Norway and Portugal in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, and the first in any major European competition since the last 32 of the 2003-04 UEFA Cup. Bodø/Glimt have won both of their previous two games against Portuguese sides in European competition, with both of those coming in last season’s UEFA Europa League.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Show - 2025/2026 - EP 26
programme.desc: All the greatest moments and action in Ligue 1 including incredible stories and interviews featuring ligue 1 stars.

programme.title: غلطة سراي مقابل ليفربول - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - ربع النهائي - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: Galatasaray have only lost one of their last nine home games against English clubs in all European competition, going down 1-4 to Arsenal in December 2014. They have already beaten Liverpool 1-0 at home in this season's competition. Liverpool have won just one of five previous UEFA Champions League meetings with Galatasaray, a win rate of 20% - their joint-lowest against any side they have faced 5+ times in the competition.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Newcastle United have faced Barcelona five times before in Europe, each coming in the UEFA Champions League. The Magpies’ only victory came in the first clash, 3-2 at home in the Group Stages in September 1997, with Barca winning each of the following four games. Barcelona have faced English opposition 33 times in the knockout stages of the UEFA Champions League, winning 10 of their last 12 matches since 2014.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Weekly Review - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Each Ligue 1 Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Chelsea - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Chelsea last faced in the UEFA Champions League in the last 16 in 2015-16, with the French side winning both legs 2-1. Chelsea have only won two out of eight UEFA Champions League matches against Paris SG. They have only lost more games against Bayern Munich and Barcelona than Paris SG in the competition.

programme.title: Highlights - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2025–26 UEFA Europa League. The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Tottenham Hotspur - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Atlético Madrid have only won one of their last 10 UEFA Champions League meetings with English clubs, beating Manchester United 1-0 in March 2022. Tottenham Hotspur have faced Atlético Madrid just once before in European competition, beating them in the 1963 Cup Winners' Cup final 5-1.

programme.title: Atalanta vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This will be Atalanta’s 14 match against German opposition across major European competition, losing just three of those matches overall and winning four of their last five since the start of 2024. Bayern Munich and Atalanta have never faced before in European competition. The Germans lost their last knockout stage tie against Italian opposition in the UEFA Champions League, after having progressed from each of their previous four knockout ties against Serie A sides in the competition.

programme.desc: "This 55-minute program offers full 5-minute highlights of each of the games played on Friday, Saturday and Sunday.LALIGA includes special video presentations of the best goal, the best save and the best player of the day."

programme.title: Ligue 1 Show - 2025/2026 - EP 26
programme.desc: All the greatest moments and action in Ligue 1 including incredible stories and interviews featuring ligue 1 stars.

programme.title: Highlights - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2025–26 UEFA Europa League. The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: ATP Tour - Magazine 2026
programme.desc: ATP Tour This Week It is comprised of the various feature stories created by ATP Media and ATP Tour

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Manchester City - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Manchester City will face Real Madrid for the 16th time in the UEFA Champions League, twice as often as they have faced any other team in the competition. This will be the first time two teams have met in the knockout phase of the competition in five consecutive seasons. Only Bayern Munich and Juventus have won more UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid than Manchester City, who beat them 2-1 in this season's league phase.

programme.title: Guardiola Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Pep Guardiola recalls memories of his career as a player and manager, in an exclusive interview with beIN SPORTS

programme.title: Mamelodi Sundowns FC (RSA vs Stade Malien (MLI) - CAF Champions League 2025/26 - R16 1ST LEG
EPL Stories 2025/2026
programme.desc: من خلال عرض الشخصيات التي شكلت عصر الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز، نروي في كل حلقة قصتهم الفريدة التي ستضمن جذب جميع المشجعين وترفيههم.

programme.title: EPL Match Officials Mic'd Up 2025/2026
programme.desc: PGMOL Chief Refereeing Officer Howard Webb joins Michael Owen to provide context and explanation behind refereeing decisions, using match footage and previously un-released audio between the on-field officials and VAR teams.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle United have won their last three home Premier League matches against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 combined. The Magpies last had a longer home league winning run against the Red Devils between 1915 and 1931. Man Utd are looking to record a Premier League double over Newcastle for the first time since the 2020-21 campaign; they won 1-0 on Boxing Day thanks to a goal from Patrick Dorgu.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle United have won their last three home Premier League matches against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 combined. The Magpies last had a longer home league winning run against the Red Devils between 1915 and 1931. Man Utd are looking to record a Premier League double over Newcastle for the first time since the 2020-21 campaign; they won 1-0 on Boxing Day thanks to a goal from Patrick Dorgu.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Tottenham Hotspur have won 16 of their last 21 Premier League matches against Crystal Palace, although they have lost two of their last three against the Eagles. After nine consecutive away league defeats at Tottenham Hotspur between 2015-16 and 2023-24, Crystal Palace won this exact fixture 2-0 last season. They have never won consecutive away league games against Spurs.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Tottenham Hotspur have won 16 of their last 21 Premier League matches against Crystal Palace, although they have lost two of their last three against the Eagles. After nine consecutive away league defeats at Tottenham Hotspur between 2015-16 and 2023-24, Crystal Palace won this exact fixture 2-0 last season. They have never won consecutive away league games against Spurs.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Wolves have lost 17 of their last 18 Premier League matches against Liverpool, winning the other 3-0 in February 2023 at Molineux under Julen Lopetegui. programme.title: Leeds United vs Norwich City - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: Leeds have lost two of their last 15 meetings with Norwich in all competitions, on both occasions losing to current manager Daniel Farke when he was Canaries boss in April 2018 and February 2019. This is the fourth FA Cup tie between Leeds and Norwich – the Canaries went through in a fourth round replay in 1934-35, while the Whites won 5-0 in a third round second replay in 1972-73 and then 5-2 in the third round in 1976-77.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Liverpool - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: كأس التحدي لاتحاد كرة القدم، والمعروف أكثر باسم كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي، هي أقدم مسابقة وطنية لكرة القدم في العالم يعود تاريخها إلى موسم 1871-1872. يتنافس 736 ناديًا للحصول على فرصة لرفع واحدة من أشهر بطولات كرة القدم الإنجليزية. جميع أفضل المباريات مباشرة وحصرية فقط على beIN.

programme.title: وست هام يونايتد ضد برينتفورد - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: فاز برينتفورد بسبع من مبارياته العشر ضد وست هام يونايتد في جميع المسابقات منذ أن أصبح فريقًا في الدوري الممتاز في عام 2021 ؛ لم يهزموا فريقًا أكثر خلال تلك الفترة. هذه هي المرة الثالثة التي يتم فيها سحب وست هام وبرينتفورد ضد بعضهما البعض في كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي – تقدم النحل في إعادة الجولة الرابعة في 1926-27 بينما فاز المطارق 1-0 في الجولة الثالثة في 2022-23 من خلال ضربة سعيد بن رحمة.

programme.title: غلطة سراي مقابل ليفربول - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - ربع النهائي - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: Galatasaray have only lost one of their last nine home games against English clubs in all European competition, going down 1-4 to Arsenal in December 2014. They have already beaten Liverpool 1-0 at home in this season's competition. Liverpool have won just one of five previous UEFA Champions League meetings with Galatasaray, a win rate of 20% - their joint-lowest against any side they have faced 5+ times in the competition.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Newcastle United have faced Barcelona five times before in Europe, each coming in the UEFA Champions League. The Magpies’ only victory came in the first clash, 3-2 at home in the Group Stages in September 1997, with Barca winning each of the following four games. Barcelona have faced English opposition 33 times in the knockout stages of the UEFA Champions League, winning 10 of their last 12 matches since 2014.

programme.title: Atalanta vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This will be Atalanta’s 14 match against German opposition across major European competition, losing just three of those matches overall and winning four of their last five since the start of 2024. Bayern Munich and Atalanta have never faced before in European competition. The Germans lost their last knockout stage tie against Italian opposition in the UEFA Champions League, after having progressed from each of their previous four knockout ties against Serie A sides in the competition.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Tottenham Hotspur - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Chelsea - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg

programme.title: beIN Champions - UEFA Champions League 2025/2026
programme.desc: beIN Champions is a look through the best of the action and the unusual stories and stats and facts from the UEFA Champions League.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Chelsea - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Chelsea last faced in the UEFA Champions League in the last 16 in 2015-16, with the French side winning both legs 2-1. Chelsea have only won two out of eight UEFA Champions League matches against Paris SG. They have only lost more games against Bayern Munich and Barcelona than Paris SG in the competition.

programme.title: Lille vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This is the fifth European meeting between Lille and Aston Villa – they met twice in the Intertoto Cup in 2002, with Villa drawing away and winning 2-0 at Villa Park, then faced in the 2023-24 Conference League quarter-final. Aston Villa have never won an away European match in France in six attempts, losing the last three in a row.

programme.title: Celta de Vigo vs Olympique Lyonnais - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Celta Vigo won none of their first four major European matches against French sides but they’ve won both this season, beating Nice and Lille – on both occasions 2-1 – in the group stage. This is Lyon’s 34th meeting with Spanish clubs in major European competitions but their first ever with Celta Vigo. They’ve already lost to Spanish opposition in the UEFA Europa League this season, a 2-0 defeat to Real Betis in the group stage.

programme.title: Highlights - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2025–26 UEFA Europa League. The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: EPL The Big Interview 2025/2026
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal ‘out and about’ interviews with the Premier League’s biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programme.title: غلطة سراي مقابل ليفربول - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - ربع النهائي - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: Galatasaray have only lost one of their last nine home games against English clubs in all European competition, going down 1-4 to Arsenal in December 2014. They have already beaten Liverpool 1-0 at home in this season's competition. Liverpool have won just one of five previous UEFA Champions League meetings with Galatasaray, a win rate of 20% - their joint-lowest against any side they have faced 5+ times in the competition.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Newcastle United have faced Barcelona five times before in Europe, each coming in the UEFA Champions League. The Magpies’ only victory came in the first clash, 3-2 at home in the Group Stages in September 1997, with Barca winning each of the following four games. Barcelona have faced English opposition 33 times in the knockout stages of the UEFA Champions League, winning 10 of their last 12 matches since 2014.

programme.title: Atalanta vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This will be Atalanta’s 14 match against German opposition across major European competition, losing just three of those matches overall and winning four of their last five since the start of 2024. programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Liverpool - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: Wolves have met Liverpool in eight previous FA Cup ties and have a positive record against the Reds, progressing more often than they’ve been eliminated. The last time they faced them in the fifth round was in 1948-49, winning 3-1 and eventually lifting that season’s trophy. This is the second time in the last five seasons that Liverpool with face the side bottom of the Premier League in the FA Cup fifth round – they won 2-1 against Norwich in 2021-22, who had knocked Wolves out in the fourth round.

programme.title: مانسفيلد تاون ضد أرسنال - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: This is the first meeting between Mansfield Town and Arsenal since January 1929, a match won 2-0 by Arsenal in the FA Cup. The Gunners have only had a bigger gap between games against Lincoln City than this 97-year gap against the Stags. Arsenal have progressed from each of their last 15 FA Cup ties against sides from the third tier or below – the last side to knock them out was fourth tier Wrexham in the third round in 1991-92.

programme.title: ريكسهام ضد تشيلسي - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: Wrexham and Chelsea haven’t met in any competition since February 1982 when the Welsh side won 1-0 in a league game, one of two wins Wrexham have registered in nine games against Chelsea. Chelsea have faced Wrexham in one previous FA Cup tie, needing two replays in the 1981-82 fourth round to knock them out. The Blues have won six of their last eight away games in Wales in all competitions, including a 3-1 win at Cardiff in the League Cup this season.

programme.title: ريكسهام ضد تشيلسي - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5

programme.title: نيوكاسل يونايتد ضد مانشستر سيتي - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: This is the 11th FA Cup tie between Newcastle and Man City – the Citizens have progressed from the last two in the quarter-finals in 2019-20 and 2023-24, having only progressed in two of the first eight ties against the Magpies. Manchester City knocked Newcastle out in the League Cup semi-finals this season – the only two teams to eliminate the Magpies from both the League Cup and FA Cup in a season are Wimbledon in 1987-88 and Arsenal in 2007-08.

programme.title: نيوكاسل يونايتد ضد مانشستر سيتي - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5

programme.title: Fulham vs Southampton - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: This is the fourth FA Cup tie between Fulham and Southampton, with the Cottagers progressing in the third round in 1998-99 after a replay and the Saints winning in the second round in 1914-15 and third round in 2017-18. Southampton have lost three of their last four matches against Fulham, all in the Premier League in the 2022-23 and 2024-25 seasons. The Saints last beat them in May 2021 under Ralph Hasenhüttl, a 3-1 home top-flight victory.

programme.title: Port Vale vs Sunderland - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: Port Vale progressed from their first two FA Cup ties against Sunderland in 1935-36 and 1961-62 but have lost their last two against the Black Cats. programme.title: Leeds United vs Norwich City - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: Leeds have lost two of their last 15 meetings with Norwich in all competitions, on both occasions losing to current manager Daniel Farke when he was Canaries boss in April 2018 and February 2019. This is the fourth FA Cup tie between Leeds and Norwich – the Canaries went through in a fourth round replay in 1934-35, while the Whites won 5-0 in a third round second replay in 1972-73 and then 5-2 in the third round in 1976-77.

programme.title: وست هام يونايتد ضد برينتفورد - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: فاز برينتفورد بسبع من مبارياته العشر ضد وست هام يونايتد في جميع المسابقات منذ أن أصبح فريقًا في الدوري الممتاز في عام 2021 ؛ لم يهزموا فريقًا أكثر خلال تلك الفترة. هذه هي المرة الثالثة التي يتم فيها سحب وست هام وبرينتفورد ضد بعضهما البعض في كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي – تقدم النحل في إعادة الجولة الرابعة في 1926-27 بينما فاز المطارق 1-0 في الجولة الثالثة في 2022-23 من خلال ضربة سعيد بن رحمة.

Roma have met fellow Italian opponents in three previous European ties: they lost over two legs to Internazionale in the 1991 UEFA Cup final and Fiorentina in the 2014-15 UEFA Europa League last 16 but knocked out Milan in the 2023-24 Europa League quarter-final.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Midtjylland - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest and FC Midtjylland have already faced in the UEFA Europa League this season, with the Danish side beating Ange Postecoglou’s Forest side 3-2 at the City Ground in October. FC Midtjylland have won four of their nine matches against English sides in all European competitions, with all four wins coming against different clubs.

programme.title: Atalanta vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This will be Atalanta’s 14 match against German opposition across major European competition, losing just three of those matches overall and winning four of their last five since the start of 2024. Bayern Munich and Atalanta have never faced before in European competition. The Germans lost their last knockout stage tie against Italian opposition in the UEFA Champions League, after having progressed from each of their previous four knockout ties against Serie A sides in the competition.

programme.title: ريكسهام ضد تشيلسي - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: Wrexham and Chelsea haven’t met in any competition since February 1982 when the Welsh side won 1-0 in a league game, one of two wins Wrexham have registered in nine games against Chelsea. Chelsea have faced Wrexham in one previous FA Cup tie, needing two replays in the 1981-82 fourth round to knock them out. The Blues have won six of their last eight away games in Wales in all competitions, including a 3-1 win at Cardiff in the League Cup this season.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Liverpool - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: Wolves have met Liverpool in eight previous FA Cup ties and have a positive record against the Reds, progressing more often than they’ve been eliminated. The last time they faced them in the fifth round was in 1948-49, winning 3-1 and eventually lifting that season’s trophy. This is the second time in the last five seasons that Liverpool with face the side bottom of the Premier League in the FA Cup fifth round – they won 2-1 against Norwich in 2021-22, who had knocked Wolves out in the fourth round.

programme.title: Bodø / Glimt vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This will be the first ever knockout stage tie between teams from Norway and Portugal in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, and the first in any major European competition since the last 32 of the 2003-04 UEFA Cup. programme.title: Bodø / Glimt vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This will be the first ever knockout stage tie between teams from Norway and Portugal in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, and the first in any major European competition since the last 32 of the 2003-04 UEFA Cup. Bodø/Glimt have won both of their previous two games against Portuguese sides in European competition, with both of those coming in last season’s UEFA Europa League.

programme.title: Bodø / Glimt vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This will be the first ever knockout stage tie between teams from Norway and Portugal in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, and the first in any major European competition since the last 32 of the 2003-04 UEFA Cup. programme.title: Stuttgart vs Porto - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This is the first ever meeting between Stuttgart and FC Porto – the German side last faced a Portuguese side in Europe in the last 32 of the 2010-11 UEFA Europa League, losing both legs to Benfica. FC Porto have won their last three major European matches against German sides – two wins against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League in October 2022 and a 2-0 win against Hoffenheim in October 2024 in the Europa League.

programme.title: Panathinaikos vs Real Betis - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This is the first meeting between Panathinaikos and Real Betis in any European competition – the Greek side have just one win in their last 18 games against Spanish teams, a 2-0 home win against Villarreal in September 2023 in the UEFA Europa League. Real Betis have played two away UEFA Europa League matches in Greece and failed to win or score in either – a 0-0 draw with Olympiakos in September 2018 and 0-2 defeat to PAOK Salonika in January this year.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Liverpool - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: Wolves have met Liverpool in eight previous FA Cup ties and have a positive record against the Reds, progressing more often than they’ve been eliminated. The last time they faced them in the fifth round was in 1948-49, winning 3-1 and eventually lifting that season’s trophy. This is the second time in the last five seasons that Liverpool with face the side bottom of the Premier League in the FA Cup fifth round – they won 2-1 against Norwich in 2021-22, who had knocked Wolves out in the fourth round.

programme.title: مانسفيلد تاون ضد أرسنال - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: This is the first meeting between Mansfield Town and Arsenal since January 1929, a match won 2-0 by Arsenal in the FA Cup. The Gunners have only had a bigger gap between games against Lincoln City than this 97-year gap against the Stags. Arsenal have progressed from each of their last 15 FA Cup ties against sides from the third tier or below – the last side to knock them out was fourth tier Wrexham in the third round in 1991-92.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Liverpool - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: Wolves have met Liverpool in eight previous FA Cup ties and have a positive record against the Reds, progressing more often than they’ve been eliminated. The last time they faced them in the fifth round was in 1948-49, winning 3-1 and eventually lifting that season’s trophy. This is the second time in the last five seasons that Liverpool with face the side bottom of the Premier League in the FA Cup fifth round – they won 2-1 against Norwich in 2021-22, who had knocked Wolves out in the fourth round.

programme.title: مانسفيلد تاون ضد أرسنال - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: This is the first meeting between Mansfield Town and Arsenal since January 1929, a match won 2-0 by Arsenal in the FA Cup. The Gunners have only had a bigger gap between games against Lincoln City than this 97-year gap against the Stags. Arsenal have progressed from each of their last 15 FA Cup ties against sides from the third tier or below – the last side to knock them out was fourth tier Wrexham in the third round in 1991-92.

programme.title: نيوكاسل يونايتد ضد مانشستر سيتي - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: This is the 11th FA Cup tie between Newcastle and Man City – the Citizens have progressed from the last two in the quarter-finals in 2019-20 and 2023-24, having only progressed in two of the first eight ties against the Magpies. Manchester City knocked Newcastle out in the League Cup semi-finals this season – the only two teams to eliminate the Magpies from both the League Cup and FA Cup in a season are Wimbledon in 1987-88 and Arsenal in 2007-08.

programme.title: Fulham vs Southampton - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: This is the fourth FA Cup tie between Fulham and Southampton, with the Cottagers progressing in the third round in 1998-99 after a replay and the Saints winning in the second round in 1914-15 and third round in 2017-18. Southampton have lost three of their last four matches against Fulham, all in the Premier League in the 2022-23 and 2024-25 seasons. The Saints last beat them in May 2021 under Ralph Hasenhüttl, a 3-1 home top-flight victory.

programme.title: Port Vale vs Sunderland - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: Port Vale progressed from their first two FA Cup ties against Sunderland in 1935-36 and 1961-62 but have lost their last two against the Black Cats. programme.title: Leeds United vs Norwich City - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: Leeds have lost two of their last 15 meetings with Norwich in all competitions, on both occasions losing to current manager Daniel Farke when he was Canaries boss in April 2018 and February 2019. This is the fourth FA Cup tie between Leeds and Norwich – the Canaries went through in a fourth round replay in 1934-35, while the Whites won 5-0 in a third round second replay in 1972-73 and then 5-2 in the third round in 1976-77.

programme.title: Leeds United vs Norwich City - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
programme.desc: Leeds have lost two of their last 15 meetings with Norwich in all competitions, on both occasions losing to current manager Daniel Farke when he was Canaries boss in April 2018 and February 2019. This is the fourth FA Cup tie between Leeds and Norwich – the Canaries went through in a fourth round replay in 1934-35, while the Whites won 5-0 in a third round second replay in 1972-73 and then 5-2 in the third round in 1976-77.

programme.title: وست هام يونايتد ضد برينتفورد - كأس الإمارات لكرة القدم 2025-26 - الجولة 5
programme.desc: فاز برينتفورد بسبع من مبارياته العشر ضد وست هام يونايتد في جميع المسابقات منذ أن أصبح فريقًا في الدوري الممتاز في عام 2021 ؛ لم يهزموا فريقًا أكثر خلال تلك الفترة. هذه هي المرة الثالثة التي يتم فيها سحب وست هام وبرينتفورد ضد بعضهما البعض في كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي – تقدم النحل في إعادة الجولة الرابعة في 1926-27 بينما فاز المطارق 1-0 في الجولة الثالثة في 2022-23 من خلال ضربة سعيد بن رحمة.

programme.title: Genk vs Freiburg - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Genk have won just one of their eight major European matches against German opponents, a 5-0 home win over MSV Duisburg in the Cup Winners’ Cup in October 1998. Freiburg have never faced a side from Belgium in any European competition – German teams have progressed from six out of seven UEFA Europa League knockout ties against Belgian teams.

programme.title: Genk vs Freiburg - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Genk have won just one of their eight major European matches against German opponents, a 5-0 home win over MSV Duisburg in the Cup Winners’ Cup in October 1998. Freiburg have never faced a side from Belgium in any European competition – German teams have progressed from six out of seven UEFA Europa League knockout ties against Belgian teams.

programme.title: Al Sadd vs Umm Salal - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W18
programme.desc: الدوري القطري هو الدوري الرسمي لكرة القدم في قطر. ويضم الدوري 12 فريقا. أشهر الأندية المشاركة هي السد، أبطال الموسم الماضي ؛ الريان والعربي، الفرق الشعبية، الدحيل والغرافة، المتنافسين الجادين على اللقب كل موسم. يضم الدوري القطري أسماء نجوم مثل فيرمينو وفيراتي وأكرم عفيف القطري، أفضل لاعب في آسيا.

programme.title: Cesson-Rennes vs Chambery - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Ferencváros vs Sporting Braga - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Ferencváros and Braga have never previously faced in European competition – the Hungarian side’s only previous meeting with Portuguese opposition was in the last 16 of the 1994-95 Cup Winners’ Cup, a 6-2 aggregate defeat to FC Porto. Sporting Braga’s only previous European meeting with a Hungarian team was in the last 16 of the 1966-67 Cup Winners’ Cup, going out 3-2 on aggregate to Györi ETO.

programme.title: Ferencváros vs Sporting Braga - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Ferencváros and Braga have never previously faced in European competition – the Hungarian side’s only previous meeting with Portuguese opposition was in the last 16 of the 1994-95 Cup Winners’ Cup, a 6-2 aggregate defeat to FC Porto. Sporting Braga’s only previous European meeting with a Hungarian team was in the last 16 of the 1966-67 Cup Winners’ Cup, going out 3-2 on aggregate to Györi ETO.

programme.title: Al Rayyan vs Al Shahania - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W18
programme.desc: الدوري القطري هو الدوري الرسمي لكرة القدم في قطر. ويضم الدوري 12 فريقا. أشهر الأندية المشاركة هي السد، أبطال الموسم الماضي ؛ الريان والعربي، الفرق الشعبية، الدحيل والغرافة، المتنافسين الجادين على اللقب كل موسم. يضم الدوري القطري أسماء نجوم مثل فيرمينو وفيراتي وأكرم عفيف القطري، أفضل لاعب في آسيا.

programme.title: Gabriel Diallo (CAN) vs Félix Auger‑Aliassime (CAN) - ATP 1000 BNP Paribas Open
programme.desc: Played at Indian Wells Tennis Garden, this ATP Masters 1000 features one of the slowest hard courts on tour, with a high bounce that neutralizes power and rewards heavy topspin and patience. Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.

programme.title: Carlos Alcaraz x Arthur Fills - ATP 500 Qatar ExxonMobil Open 2026
programme.desc: Doha hosts a premier ATP 500 event on outdoor hard courts at the Khalifa International Tennis & Squash Complex. The 32-player singles draw competes for 500 ATP points and a $2,760,000 USD prize pool, making it a key early-season destination for elite men’s tennis in the Middle East.

programme.title: Al Ahli vs Al Arabi - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W18
programme.desc: الدوري القطري هو الدوري الرسمي لكرة القدم في قطر. ويضم الدوري 12 فريقا. أشهر الأندية المشاركة هي السد، أبطال الموسم الماضي ؛ الريان والعربي، الفرق الشعبية، الدحيل والغرافة، المتنافسين الجادين على اللقب كل موسم. يضم الدوري القطري أسماء نجوم مثل فيرمينو وفيراتي وأكرم عفيف القطري، أفضل لاعب في آسيا.

programme.title: سباق - جائزة أستراليا الكبرى للفورمولا 1 - 2026
programme.desc: ألبرت بارك (ملبورن)، 6–8 مارس 2026: افتتاح الموسم. تعطي الممارسة أول قراءة حقيقية للوتيرة على المدى الطويل وتآكل الإطارات، والتأهل هو معركة ذات لفة واحدة مسطحة حيث يكون تطور المضمار مهمًا، وسباق الجائزة الكبرى هو 58 لفة (306.124 كم) تتشكل من الاستراتيجية وسيارات السلامة ونوافذ الحفر.

programme.title: سباق - جائزة أستراليا الكبرى للفورمولا 1 - 2026
programme.desc: ألبرت بارك (ملبورن)، 6–8 مارس 2026: افتتاح الموسم. تعطي الممارسة أول قراءة حقيقية للوتيرة على المدى الطويل وتآكل الإطارات، والتأهل هو معركة ذات لفة واحدة مسطحة حيث يكون تطور المضمار مهمًا، وسباق الجائزة الكبرى هو 58 لفة (306.124 كم) تتشكل من الاستراتيجية وسيارات السلامة ونوافذ الحفر.

programme.title: سباق - جائزة أستراليا الكبرى للفورمولا 1 - 2026
programme.desc: ألبرت بارك (ملبورن)، 6–8 مارس 2026: افتتاح الموسم. تعطي الممارسة أول قراءة حقيقية للوتيرة على المدى الطويل وتآكل الإطارات، والتأهل هو معركة ذات لفة واحدة مسطحة حيث يكون تطور المضمار مهمًا، وسباق الجائزة الكبرى هو 58 لفة (306.124 كم) تتشكل من الاستراتيجية وسيارات السلامة ونوافذ الحفر.

Al Ahli vs Qatar Club - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W14
programme.desc: الدوري القطري هو الدوري الرسمي لكرة القدم في قطر. ويضم الدوري 12 فريقا. أشهر الأندية المشاركة هي السد، أبطال الموسم الماضي ؛ الريان والعربي، الفرق الشعبية، الدحيل والغرافة، المتنافسين الجادين على اللقب كل موسم. يضم الدوري القطري أسماء نجوم مثل فيرمينو وفيراتي وأكرم عفيف القطري، أفضل لاعب في آسيا.

programme.title: Montpellier vs Paris - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Montpellier vs Paris - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Tremblay vs Nimes - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: UEFA UCL Magazine 2025/2026 - MD11 Preview
programme.desc: A recap of the best of the action, plus a look forward to the next Match Day in Europe’s premium football competition, the UEFA Champions League. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. All matches from the UEFA Champions League are live and exclusive only on beIN with a choice of Arabic or English commentary.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Sète vs Cannes - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
programme.desc: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.

programme.title: Al Wakrah vs Al Shamal - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W18
programme.desc: الدوري القطري هو الدوري الرسمي لكرة القدم في قطر. ويضم الدوري 12 فريقا. أشهر الأندية المشاركة هي السد، أبطال الموسم الماضي ؛ الريان والعربي، الفرق الشعبية، الدحيل والغرافة، المتنافسين الجادين على اللقب كل موسم. يضم الدوري القطري أسماء نجوم مثل فيرمينو وفيراتي وأكرم عفيف القطري، أفضل لاعب في آسيا.
